description.en: On deploy and at 50% health, stun nearby enemies for 5 seconds.
After hooking a target, deal double damage on the next attack.

details.advanced_info:
Melee cleave
Arc 140 degrees
Hook
5-second cooldown
Minimum range 3
Maximum acquire range 9
Targets the lowest max health Ranged enemy in range
Noxious Presence talent
Applies 1 stack of Poison every 3 seconds on a radius of 4
Does not hit flying minis
Cannonball talent
Stun radius 3.5
5-second baseline, 0.75 seconds level modifier, 1.25 seconds minimum duration
Stun will proc whenever Abomination enters below 50% health, so it can happen again if the Abomination is healed to above 50%

description.en: If played for 4 Gold or less, gain 100% Attack Speed.
If played for 5 Gold or more, redirect enemy Spell and Unbound deploys to Ancient of War's current location.

details.advanced_info:
Surge Health and damage scaling
Linear scaling per gold spent
Multiplier per gold spent 0.23999
For example, a level 1 Ancient of War has 850 health when played for 1 gold, 1054 (+204) health when played for 2 gold, and 1258 (+204 more again) health when played for 3 gold

description.en: Nearby Beast allies can consume a Chicken to heal themselves.
Deploy in a protective crate. When destroyed, Chickens emerge.

details.advanced_info:
Snackrifice talent
Eating a Chicken heals a Beast mini for 500
Walking Crate talent
Movement speed 2 (slow)
Single-target melee attack that deals 60 siege damage every second
Targeting based on having to turn as little as possible
210 health

descriptions.en: Double damage when attacking from Stealth.
50% Physical damage reduction.
Periodically summon a Frosty Footman, max 2 (13 second cooldown).
Attack roots enemies, immobilising them.
Attack stuns enemies.
While in play, replaces this Mini in your deck with the Blast Wave spell: Burn and knock back enemies near buildings.
Bloodlusted units gain +33% movement and attack speed.
Attacks ground enemies only.
Enemies are Rooted for 3 seconds when first entering an AOE around Cenarius.
Attach to the nearest allied Tower or Base, shielding it.
Consumes fallen enemy gold residue to regain health.
Multiplies from slain enemies.
Charges to enemy targets.
Attacking from Stealth will Stun enemy units.
2 cost or less for more Mini plays!
Detect and attack Sealthed enemies.
Dismounts the mount/vehicle after it's destroyed.
Alternates between Starfall and Entangling Roots whenever a Cenarion Mini is played.
Changing forms whenever a Cenarion Mini is played
Deals elemental damage. Strong vs Armored.
Fastest moving units.
Non-Elemental allies apply Burn on hit.
Frost damage slows enemy movement and attack speed.
Attack speed increases while in combat.
Unit hatches into final form when attacked.
Summon a Banshee on death.
Mountaineer periodically heals his Bear companion.
Heals friendly units.
Hooks ranged enemies.
Alliance Minis summon a Skeleton Mage on death.
Outranges EVERYTHING else.
Challenges the first enemy in sight to a duel, revealing their true strength if victorious. Gains more power the closer the duel was.
Mines Gold from Gold Veins.
Immune to Poison, Burn, Stun and slowing effects.
Deals a percentage of the target's health in damage.
Deals stacking damage over time. Strong vs Armored.
Takes control of an enemy unit.
One-time self resurrection. Reborn at 50% life.
Apply Frost to nearby enemies.
Takes 50% less Elemental damage.
Squadmates resurrect each other.
Protect a nearby Building or Meeting Stone from the next 3 attacks. Ability has one charge.
Morphs into an alternate form at 50% health.
Double damage vs Towers.
Invisible to enemies until it attacks or is damaged.
Summons additional units.
Consumes remaining Gold when deployed.
High health unit. Good at soaking Tower damage.
Nearby allies are healed over time.
Can be played anywhere on the map.
Cannot be slowed, rooted, frozen stunned, or polymorphed.
Unit takes 2x elemental damage.
